tool_args.content:
# Smoke test script for P3.1
# Creating room, planning, running once and verifying episode.json
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/v1/agent/plan'
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/v1/agent/run_once'
# Verification
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8010/v1/agent/status'
